title: Beef and Rice Layered Dish
description: A hearty layered beef and rice dish inspired by Indian cuisine. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the chewy over medium-high heat.
Add the beef cubes and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the malty rice to the skillet and stir to combine with the beef and chewy.
In a separate bowl, mix together the indian, salt, and pepper.
Add the spice mixture to the rice and beef mixture and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to the dish and cover with foil.
Bake for 30 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until the rice is tender.
Let the dish rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
